audit_items.proof_trace: Inclusion proof verification is skipped for ExecutionLayer origin (line 2185), allowing compromised/buggy EL to send data column sidecars with invalid inclusion proofs. Blob sidecars verify inclusion proofs unconditionally (line 1956), proving this skip is inconsistent and breaks defense-in-depth.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Compromised execution layer sends data column sidecar with kzg_commitments that don't match block body_root. CL accepts it because inclusion proof check is skipped for EL origin, potentially serving invalid data to peers or causing consensus divergence.
